step_1_image_prompt: An overhead flat-lay shot on a warm walnut bedside table with rich grain and a soft natural sheen. Around the central area: a small ceramic mug of matcha with steam still visible at the upper-left, a small brass alarm clock at the upper-right, an open hardcover book with a small dried-flower bookmark spanning the center-left, a single sprig of fresh eucalyptus along the lower-left edge, and the corner of a folded cream waffle-knit blanket draping into the lower edge of the frame. The center-right of the composition is intentionally empty — clean walnut surface with generous negative space, slightly overlapping the right page of the open book, perfectly framed by the surrounding items in a relaxed asymmetric arrangement. Soft natural morning daylight from above-right, throwing long gentle shadows across the walnut surface, warm honeyed tones, gentle warm glow across the empty area. Shot on Sony A7IV 50mm lens directly overhead. Real photograph, not AI-generated, candid moment. Real wood grain texture and subtle dust on the surface, bedside ritual slow morning mood, palette of walnut, cream, sage green, soft amber, matcha green. Minimalist editorial composition with deliberate emptiness at center-right.

fal_pulid_params.negative_prompt: extra limbs, deformed hands, mutated hands, bad anatomy, lowres, blurry, watermark, text, signature, distorted, plastic surfaces, oversaturated, AI-generated look, illustration, 3D render, CGI

step_2_brief.intended_grip_or_placement: The Alluvi box sits at the center-right of the composition with its front face up to the camera, slightly overlapping the edge of the open book, the matcha mug to the upper-left, the brass alarm clock at the upper-right, eucalyptus sprig along the lower-left edge.
step_2_brief.intended_product_position: Step 2 will composite the Alluvi box at the center-right of the empty negative space, oriented with its long side roughly parallel to the lower frame edge, front face up to the camera, slightly overlapping the right edge of the open hardcover book, with a soft warm shadow extending toward the lower-left to match the above-right morning light direction.

id_weight_recommendation.reasoning: No persona in frame — id_weight lowered from 1.0 to 0.5 to prevent PuLID from forcing any partial face or hand artifact into the empty center-right negative space reserved for the product in Step 2.
